channel.title: Posts on My Course Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My Course Portfolio

item.title: About
item.description:
About

This website is a portfolio for my course work.

It brings together my assignments, reflections, and notes from 13 course sessions. I use this space to document what I work on, what I learn, and how my ideas develop over time.

The purpose of the site is to create a simple overview of my progress throughout the course and present my written work in a clear way.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Contact

You can add your contact details here later.

For example:

  • Email
  • LinkedIn
  • GitHub

item.title: Expectations for the Elective Course
item.description:
My expectations

In this post, I write about my expectations for the elective course.

I hope to learn new ways of working with digital tools, reflections, and creative processes. I also want to develop my understanding through the 13 course sessions and document my progress along the way.

What I hope to gain

I hope this course will help me strengthen both my practical and reflective skills. I want to become better at connecting theory, ideas, and my own experiences in the assignments.
